testcase.name: test_trading_scan_returns_signals

error.message:
failed on setup with "AssertionError: Auth failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code"

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_trading_signals.py:18: in setup assert response.status_code == 200, f"Auth failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Auth failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
